sentences.arabic: تَلْعَبُ الِاسْتِعَارَةُ دَوْرًا مِحْوَرِيًّا فِي صِيَاغَةِ الصُّوَرِ الْأَدَبِيَّةِ بَيْنَ دَفَّاتِ الْكُتُبِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Metafora igra ključnu ulogu u oblikovanju književnih slika unutar korica arapskih knjiga.
sentences.translationEn: Metaphor plays a pivotal role in shaping literary images within the covers of Arabic books.

sentences.arabic: فَالْكَاتِبُ لَا يَكْتَفِي بِنَقْلِ الْخَبَرِ، بَلْ يَسْعَى إِلَى بَعْثِ الرُّوحِ فِي الْجَمَادَاتِ مِنْ خِلَالِ التَّشْبِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Pisac se ne zadovoljava samo prenošenjem vijesti, već nastoji udahnuti duh u nežive stvari kroz poređenje.
sentences.translationEn: The writer is not satisfied with just conveying information, but seeks to breathe life into inanimate objects through comparison.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَقُولُ الْأَدِيبُ "بَكَتِ السَّمَاءُ"، فَهُوَ يَنْقُلُ لَنَا مَشْهَدَ الْمَطَرِ بِإِحْسَاسٍ إِنْسَانِيٍّ عَمِيقٍ.
sentences.translation: Kada književnik kaže 'nebo je zaplakalo', on nam prenosi prizor kiše s dubokim ljudskim osjećajem.
sentences.translationEn: When a writer says 'the sky wept,' he conveys the scene of rain with a deep human feeling.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الصُّوَرُ الْبَيَانِيَّةُ تُحَفِّزُ خَيَالَ الْقَارِئِ وَتَجْعَلُهُ يَنْغَمِسُ فِي تَفَاصِيلِ النَّصِّ.
sentences.translation: Ove retoričke slike stimulišu maštu čitaoca i čine ga udubljenim u detalje teksta.
sentences.translationEn: These rhetorical images stimulate the reader's imagination and make them immerse themselves in the details of the text.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْقُدْرَةَ عَلَى ابْتِكَارِ مَجَازَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ هِيَ مِعْيَارُ الْإِبْدَاعِ لَدَى الْكُتَّابِ الْمُعَاصِرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Sposobnost stvaranja novih metafora je mjerilo kreativnosti kod savremenih pisaca.
sentences.translationEn: The ability to create new metaphors is the criterion of creativity for modern writers.

sentences.arabic: هَكَذَا تَبْقَى اللُّغَةُ كَائِنًا حَيًّا يَتَجَدَّدُ بِاسْتِمْرَارٍ عَبْرَ الْخَيَالِ الْخَصْبِ.
sentences.translation: Tako jezik ostaje živo biće koje se neprestano obnavlja kroz plodnu maštu.
sentences.translationEn: In this way, language remains a living being that is constantly renewed through fertile imagination.
